sourceMovie.title: Duel
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Duel works as a action movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The action and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Rambo: Last Blood
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Duel clicked for you, Rambo: Last Blood (2019) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and thriller, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Duel?
faq.answer: Try Rambo: Last Blood, The Kingdom, The Marksman—each shares DNA with Duel while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Duel?
faq.answer: Duel (1971) is best described as Action, Thriller, TV Movie. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Duel worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.4/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
